repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #93549 by keeping the fix scoped to watchdog phase recognition and minimal regression coverage. Confirm on checkout that valid phase signals clear the pre-execution watchdog without changing timing, scheduling, cancellation, or unrelated embedded-runner behavior; then validate and run /review before any downstream merge consideration.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(cron): repair pre-execution watchdog phase recognition
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs the cron isolated-agent pre-execution watchdog fix from #93549.
- Keeps the patch scoped to watchdog phase recognition and focused timer regression coverage.
- Does not change watchdog timing, scheduling, or cancellation policy outside the proven path.

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm -s vitest run src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts
- /review

## Credit
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93549
Thanks @lzyyzznl for the original watchdog fix and regression direction.

## Linked refs
Fix path for #93530 via #93549.
credit_notes: Credit contributor @lzyyzznl as the source PR author in any replacement or repaired PR body.
